source_spans.text: Accidental Bitumen and Steam Release from a Wellhead in the Athabasca Oil Sands
significantly higher cytochrome P450 (CYP1A1; hepatic detoxification) activity was observed in specimens collected in the high-impact zones
higher ethoxyresoru ﬁn‐O‐deethylase induction was no longer evident
tissue Pb was higher in voles from both the moderate‐ and high‐impact zones relative to the reference site
Cr was significantly higher than in the reference-site animals
SMI was significantly lower in 2017 than in 2014
through biodegradation, photolysis, and other natural processes
